lines.label: subject

lines.label: subject
lines.detail: `subject` units differ in baseline and `x` slope; the model estimates whether these are associated. It uses 3 covariance parameters for intercept, x. The data contain 3 `subject` levels, with at least 2 rows per level (median 2). Within-group support is present for `x`. Within-group support was not assessed for `intercept`. The requested covariance is too rich for the available grouping-level information. Formula detail: `(1 + x | subject)`.
